title: oedibasis platycarpa
intro: Oedibasis platycarpa, also known as the broad-fruited water-plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family of cattails. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or taken as supplements to reap its medicinal benefits.
